_comment: USCIA Phase 3 — Mock Execution Agents. Live specialist agents will be deployed and registered on the SAP Agent Gateway in Phase 4.

uscia-execution-mock._description: Simulated execution agents for local development and end-to-end dispatch testing. Each tool mirrors the interface that the live Phase 4 specialist agent will expose on the Agent Gateway.

restart_bgrfc_queue.description: [MOCK AGENT] Restarts a blocked bgRFC queue entry in S/4HANA. Simulates the SM58 restart that the live bgRFC Execution Agent will perform in Phase 4.

mock_response.message: Mock: bgRFC queue restart simulated successfully. The live bgRFC Execution Agent (Phase 4) will perform this operation autonomously on the target S/4HANA system.
mock_response.phase_notice: ⚠️ Mock Agent — Live specialist agent will be deployed in Phase 4.

reprocess_cpi_message.description: [MOCK AGENT] Reprocesses a failed SAP Integration Suite (CPI/RTI) message. Simulates the SXMB_MONI retry that the live CPI Execution Agent will perform in Phase 4.

mock_response.message: Mock: Failed CPI message requeue simulated successfully. The live CPI Execution Agent (Phase 4) will trigger message reprocessing via the Integration Suite API.
mock_response.phase_notice: ⚠️ Mock Agent — Live specialist agent will be deployed in Phase 4.

rerun_ppds_heuristic.description: [MOCK AGENT] Reruns the PP/DS scheduling heuristic for a material/plant. Simulates the /SAPAPO/RRP3 heuristic run that the live PP/DS Execution Agent will perform in Phase 4.

mock_response.message: Mock: PP/DS heuristic run simulated — 3 orders rescheduled in simulated horizon. The live PP/DS Execution Agent (Phase 4) will execute this via the PP/DS API.
mock_response.phase_notice: ⚠️ Mock Agent — Live specialist agent will be deployed in Phase 4.

rerun_mrp_single_item.description: [MOCK AGENT] Runs single-item MRP for a material/plant combination. Simulates the MD03 planning run that the live MRP Execution Agent will perform in Phase 4.

mock_response.message: Mock: Single-item MRP run simulated — 2 planned orders created for material/plant. The live MRP Execution Agent (Phase 4) will execute this via the S/4HANA MRP API.
mock_response.phase_notice: ⚠️ Mock Agent — Live specialist agent will be deployed in Phase 4.

rerun_ibp_planning_job.description: [MOCK AGENT] Triggers an IBP supply planning job for a material/plant. Simulates the IBP job submission that the live IBP Execution Agent will perform in Phase 4.

mock_response.message: Mock: IBP supply planning job submitted and completed in simulation. The live IBP Execution Agent (Phase 4) will submit and monitor this job via the IBP OData API.
mock_response.phase_notice: ⚠️ Mock Agent — Live specialist agent will be deployed in Phase 4.
